title: JOANLAB Lab Magnetic Stirrer 6 Multi Position Digital Multi Magnetic Stirrer Mixer 6x500ml Multi Stirrer Plate 50-1500rpm|with Timing Function
description:
Intelligent Design: LCD liquid crystal display, time and speed of multi-head magnetic stir plate can be displayed clear. With Continues and Timed Function (1min -19h59min). Lock screen function during operation, parameters will not be modified because of accidental touch, the experiment is safer.
SYNCHRONOUS/ASYNCHRONOUS OPERATION:Speed and time of multi position magnetic stirrer can be separately for each station ,and the same parameters can be set for collectively. 6 kinds of solutions can be processed simultaneously or independently with lab magnetic multi stirrer, to meet various experimental needs,saving time and effort.
Maintenance-free Brushless Motor: Our multi magnetic stirrer plate is with brushless motor , more stable without maintenance and worry, low noise, can ensure stable speed adjustment,capable of providing a long working life under repeated and continuous use.
Wide Application: As a practical laboratory mixer,it is used in colleges and universities, scientific research, environmental protection sanitation, epidemic prevention, petroleum, chemical industry
【Excellent After-sales Protection】We back the lab the multi magnetic stirrer plate with a 1 Year Warranty.Any question, please contact us at the first time, we are here to serve you!
reviews_5s:
Already broke 2. but it is a great product.
I drink my coffee with it and can dial exactly from my espresso machine.
need to be very careful not to bump it.
Reminds me my time at the lab my PhD school, fun memories.Took a long time to ship like 1month but its good quality thats what matters
